title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Hexaware Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
